title: run.oci.keep_original_groups in YAMLs from podman kube generate fail annotation checks
body:
### Issue Description

`podman kube play` fails when playing k8s YAMLs generated with `podman kube generate` when the generated container has `--group-add keep-groups` option set.

This is caused by `run.oci.keep_original_groups/foo: "1"` annotation in the generated YAML.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman run -d --name foo --group-add keep-groups alpine sleep inf`
2. `podman kube generate foo > foo.yaml`
3. `podman kube play foo.yaml`


### Describe the results you received

Error message:
```
Error: annotations must be formatted as a valid lowercase RFC1123 subdomain of lower case alphanumeric characters, '-' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'example.com', regex used for validation is '[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*')
```

### Describe the results you expected

The kube play command to pass.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

I originally hit this with Podman API where the server responds with code 500 but the issue can also be reproduced with the CLI.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
